Financial Results -2024 Monthly Revenue

  • Quarterly Results
  • Annual Reports
  • Monthly Revenue

Please select a year:

Historical Monthly Revenue

2024 Monthly Revenue

(In Millions of New Taiwan Dollars)

Month Consolidated
Net Revenue YoY Change
Jan.
215,785 7.9%
Feb.
181,648 11.3%
Mar.
195,211 34.3%
Apr.
236,021 59.6%
May
229,620 30.1%
Jun.
207,869 32.9%
Jul.
256,953 44.7%
Aug.
250,866 33.0%
Sept.
251,873 39.6%
Oct.
314,240 29.2%
Nov.
276,058 34.0%
Dec.
278,163 57.8%
Total
2,894,308 33.9%

* Year 2024 figures have not been audited.
** Starting 2013, TSMC prepares financial statements in accordance with TIFRS (International Financial Reporting Standards as endorsed in R.O.C.), TSMC will report only consolidated financial figures from January 2013.
